member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( order by tab.member_group_control ,tab.member_group_no , tab.membership_no) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id, (CASE lag(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no ) WHEN sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_installment,
sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as balance_tdate, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_status_code ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.fund_amount FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '30/09/2024' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no )tab
